auth.heroTitle: I may not have money, but at least I know where it went.
auth.heroDescription: Kinti keeps subscriptions, bills and one-off payments in one friendly place, so your month feels clearer without becoming a spreadsheet.
auth.signInDescription: Sign in and pick up right where your budget left off.
auth.signUpDescription: Create a cozy little home for the expenses that always show up at the worst possible time.
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.signUpNotice: Your account is ready. If you get a confirmation email, open it and we will get back to the money.
dashboard.title: How is the month going?
dashboard.description: A quick look at what is already handled and what still wants a little attention.
dashboard.metric.plannedDescription: What you expect this month to cost
dashboard.remainingDescription: The small queue of bills that is better seen early than late.
dashboard.paidDescription: Things you can safely stop thinking about this month.
dashboard.allPaid: Everything is checked off for this month. Rare, but beautiful.
dashboard.noPaid: No paid expenses here yet. The day is young.
dashboard.loadError: We could not load this month's picture. Try again in a moment.
expenses.title: Your expenses
expenses.description: Subscriptions, bills, one-off purchases and all the tiny financial surprises that usually live rent-free in your head.
expenses.emptyDescription: Add your first expense and Kinti will start making the picture clearer for you.
expenses.noMatchesDescription: Try a different word or bring the filter back to all expenses.
expenses.loadError: We could not show your expenses. Try again in a moment.
calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: See when bills, subscriptions and tiny financial surprises show up during the month.
calendar.noExpensesForDay: No planned expenses for this day. The calendar stays calmly quiet for now.
calendar.emptyTitle: The calendar is quiet for now
calendar.emptyDescription: Add a few expenses and this view will start showing the money rhythm of your month.
settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Make Kinti feel a little more yours. The language and theme should work for you, not the other way around.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language where money sounds least intimidating.
settings.themeDescription: Light for a fresh start, dark for late-night money thoughts, or whatever your device prefers.
settings.currencyDescription: Choose how amounts should look. For now we do not convert, we just speak the right money language.
settings.backgroundDescription: These are calm base backgrounds with separate light and dark variants.
settings.accentDescription: The color for primary actions, selection and active navigation.
settings.surface.mist.label: Mist
settings.surface.mist.description: A cool and clean background for longer work.
settings.surface.linen.label: Linen
settings.surface.linen.description: A warm neutral background with soft contrast.
settings.surface.sage.label: Sage
settings.surface.sage.description: A green tone suited to a finance feel.
settings.surface.dusk.label: Dusk
settings.surface.dusk.description: A muted background with a quieter character.
expenseForm.title: New expense
expenseForm.description: Tell us what keeps pulling from your budget. We will keep an eye on it for you.
expenseForm.name: Name
expenseForm.dueDateHelp.monthly: We will expect it around this day every month.
expenseForm.dueDateHelp.yearly: We will keep it ready for the same date every year.
expenseForm.dueDateHelp.oneTime: We will show it for this moment only. Then it stays quiet.
expenseForm.iconDescription: Give it a face, so you can spot it at a glance.
expenseForm.descriptionPlaceholder: For example: contract ends in June, check for a cheaper plan.
expenseForm.createError: We could not add the expense. Let's try again in a moment.
expenseForm.nameMax: Name cannot be longer than 255 characters.
expenseForm.amountInvalid: Amount must use a format like 20 or 20.50.
expenseForm.descriptionMax: Description cannot be longer than 255 characters.
paymentForm.title: Mark as paid
paymentForm.description: Record what you actually paid and when. Then we move it out of the waiting list.
paymentForm.createError: We could not save the payment. Let's try again in a moment.
paymentForm.amountInvalid: Amount must use a format like 20 or 20.50.
expenseEdit.title: Edit expense
expenseEdit.description: Change the details when the amount, date or expense itself no longer looks quite right.
expenseEdit.updateError: We could not save the changes. Let's try again in a moment.
expenseArchive.title: Archive expense
expenseArchive.description: This removes it from active lists without roughly deleting your history.
expenseArchive.body: The expense will no longer appear in Dashboard and Expenses. Later we can add a separate archive if it feels worth it.
expenseArchive.archiveError: We could not archive the expense. Try again in a moment.
expenseDetails.loadError: We could not load this expense. It may be archived, or just refusing to cooperate.
expenseDetails.noDescription: No description yet. Sometimes that is clear enough.
expenseDetails.historyDescription: Every time this expense has been checked off as paid.
expenseDetails.emptyHistory: No payments for this expense yet. The first checkmark will start the story.
expenseOptions.billing.monthly.label: Monthly
expenseOptions.billing.monthly.descripti: The classic. Shows up every month.
expenseOptions.billing.yearly.label: Yearly
expenseOptions.billing.yearly.descriptio: Rare visitor, often a chunky one.
expenseOptions.billing.oneTime.label: One-time
expenseOptions.billing.oneTime.descripti: One time, then we leave it alone.
expenseOptions.type.subscription.label: Subscription
expenseOptions.type.subscription.descrip: Usually the same amount, until someone decides to raise prices.
expenseOptions.type.utility.label: Utility
expenseOptions.type.utility.description: A slightly different story every month.
expenseOptions.importance.useful.label: Useful
expenseOptions.importance.useful.descrip: Nice to have, but the world will keep spinning.
expenseOptions.importance.cancelSoon.des: One more month and we really think about it. Maybe.
